permits.description: Replace siding,trim and exterior details,in kind and alike, as needed-Repair existing side entrance-Repair existing side decks-Repair existing front fence-Repair existing shed -Replace flashing and flat roof membrane -Replace 2 existing skylights-Repair existing front entry -Per plans and notes
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($402,842); minor: fence; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The permit focuses on extensive exterior maintenance and restoration (siding, roof, trim) by a long-term owner-occupant rather than high-end interior renovations like kitchens or bathrooms.
